fixtures.source: The latest update is in the [community notice](https://example.com/everyday/community-notice).
Find a new option on the [meal ideas page](https://example.com/everyday/meal-ideas).
Look up the endpoint in the [API reference](https://example.com/work/api-reference).
Add the needed details with the [issue template](https://example.com/work/issue-template).
Open the [preview build](https://example.com/work/preview-build) for a quick check.
Track the next task on the [project board](https://example.com/work/project-board).
Use the [prompt guide](https://example.com/work/prompt-guide) to refine the request.
Follow the [setup guide](https://example.com/work/setup-guide) before running the project.
